moduleDescription: This module implements a hookable (de)serialization for arbitrary types using JSON. Design goal: avoid importing modules where a custom serialization is needed; see strtabs.fromJsonHook,toJsonHook for an example.

entries.name: Joptions
entries.code:
Joptions = object
  allowExtraKeys*: bool ## If `true` Nim's object to which the JSON is parsed is not required to
                        ## have a field for every JSON key.
  allowMissingKeys*: bool ## If `true` Nim's object to which JSON is parsed is allowed to have
                          ## fields without corresponding JSON keys.
entries.description: Options controlling the behavior of fromJson.

entries.name: JsonNodeMode
entries.code:
JsonNodeMode = enum
  joptJsonNodeAsRef,        ## returns the ref as is
  joptJsonNodeAsCopy,       ## returns a deep copy of the JsonNode
  joptJsonNodeAsObject       ## treats JsonNode as a regular ref object
entries.description: controls toJson for JsonNode types

entries.name: ToJsonOptions
entries.code:
ToJsonOptions = object
  enumMode*: EnumMode
  jsonNodeMode*: JsonNodeMode

entries.name: initToJsonOptions
entries.description: initializes ToJsonOptions with sane options.

entries.name: fromJson
entries.code: proc fromJson[T](a: var T; b: JsonNode; opt = Joptions())

entries.name: jsonTo
entries.code: proc jsonTo(b: JsonNode; T: typedesc; opt = Joptions()): T:type

entries.name: toJson
entries.code: proc toJson[T](a: T; opt = initToJsonOptions()): JsonNode
entries.description:
serializes a to json; uses toJsonHook(a: T) if it's in scope to customize serialization, see strtabs.toJsonHook for an example.
Note: With -d:nimPreviewJsonutilsHoleyEnum, toJson now can serialize/deserialize holey enums as regular enums (via ord) instead of as strings. It is expected that this behavior becomes the new default in upcoming versions.

entries.name: fromJsonHook
entries.description:
Enables fromJson for Table and OrderedTable types.

See also:

  • toJsonHook proc

entries.name: toJsonHook
entries.code:
proc toJsonHook[K: string | cstring; V](t: (Table[K, V] | OrderedTable[K, V]);
                                        opt = initToJsonOptions()): JsonNode
entries.description:
Enables toJson for Table and OrderedTable types.

See also:

  • fromJsonHook proc

entries.code: proc fromJsonHook[A](s: var SomeSet[A]; jsonNode: JsonNode; opt = Joptions())
entries.description:
Enables fromJson for HashSet and OrderedSet types.

See also:

  • toJsonHook proc

entries.code: proc toJsonHook[A](s: SomeSet[A]; opt = initToJsonOptions()): JsonNode
entries.description:
